title: [Cobblemon] Glowing Evolutionary Stones
description:
Similar to other glowing ore packs, I took it upon myself to make a resource pack to make all of the evolutionary stones glow as well!

Currently only tested with the official Cobblemon Modpack
body:
Simple resource pack that makes the evolutionary stones glow in the cobblemon mod.  
If you have any questions, please message me at Deni#6200 on discord!
